signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Fully Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Fully Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The SEC has dropped its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs, removing a major regulatory overhang that suppressed XRP's price for years and driving a 10% surge to above $1.50 before settling at ~$1.42 in April 2026[1][2].
